column1: # Description: Crown jewel subset watchlist for dynamic severity
#   assignment in detection rules. Contains only the highest-
#   criticality assets (Tier 1 and Tier 2) with their impact
# Usage: Populated from the Crown Jewel Analysis described in
#   Chapter 6. Referenced by detection rules to escalate alert
#   severity when crown jewel assets are involved. Maintained
#   jointly by SOC and OT Engineering teams.
# AssetName          : string  — Descriptive name of the crown jewel asset
# PhysicalProcess    : string  — The physical process this asset controls
# CompositeScore     : int     — Sum of all impact scores
# FailSafePosition   : string  — Documented fail-safe state for this asset
# EscalationContact  : string  — Name and phone for immediate escalation
# LastReviewDate     : date    — Date of last crown jewel review

column7: Chlorine dosing control - potable water supply
column13: Dosing pump stops; chlorine injection ceases; manual dosing protocol activates
System defaults to safe shutdown state; boiler trips to cold state
Filtration halts; raw water bypass valve opens (manual monitoring required)

column7: SCADA server - Plant A visibility and control
column13: Loss of view only; PLCs continue autonomous operation on last-known setpoints
